programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian writes a play that becomes a hit in Quahog, but loses his confidence when he finds that Stewie is also a budding playwright and is better at it. When the toddler sees how upset his friend is, he decides to make amends. Animation, featuring the guest voice of playwright Alan Bennett as himself

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Bobby Briggs, the criminal who paralysed Joe years before, breaks out of jail - but he does not bargain on the community's hostile reception, as Quagmire, Joe and Peter unite to hunt him down. Meanwhile, Brian grows jealous when Lois gets a cat to look after

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger meets Meredith, the most interesting woman in Langley Falls, and he struggles to create a new, more fabulous persona to keep up with her. When he fails, Francine suggests the dejected alien embark on a journey of self-discovery, which doesn't go exactly as planned. Meanwhile, Stan and the others overdo it during a workout, and end up feeling too sore to move, giving Klaus the chance to throw himself a party

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger talks Francine into taking advantage of Stan's absence by playing the 'Widow Game', which involves the two of them posing as widows in order to gain sympathy - and free stuff. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois causes Peter some distress when she tells him about her dinner date with former boyfriend Ross Fishman, his wife Pam, and their son Ben. programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents

programme.title: The Cabins
programme.desc: There is a frosty atmosphere in one cabin after yesterday's fireworks, while with check-out looming, there are some burning questions that still need answering for another couple

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Comedy following three desperate young men from the suburbs as they pursue romance, try to hold down jobs and climb the social ladder in Ancient Rome. Things take an upward turn for Marcus, Stylax and Grumio when they meet two attractive British girls in the courtyard and stumble upon a flyer for an orgy. Starring Tom Rosenthal, Joel Fry and Ryan Sampson

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Cynthia's charming new gladiator boyfriend Cassius impresses everyone except a jealous Marcus, who makes it clear that he wants the relationship to fail as soon as possible. Meanwhile, Stylax plays a prank on Aurelius that ends up going a little too far. Comedy, guest starring Danny Dyer, with Tom Rosenthal, Joel Fry and Ryan Sampson

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois is not looking forward to her birthday, so she decides to turn her life around by adopting a different, younger lifestyle, growing her hair and having a makeover on a shopping trip. Meanwhile, Stewie finds a turtle at the park and adopts him as a new pet

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg reveals her infatuation with a popular boy at school, Kent Lastname. Esther suggests that she ask him out, but she fears almost certain rejection. Meanwhile, Stewie overhears the hunk mentioning Meg's brother and begins to think he might be gay

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve and his friends start up a live-action role-playing game, and Francine finds herself strangely drawn to the fantasy world they create. Meanwhile, Stan opens a marine animal theme park in the Smith family home

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan begins to question Christianity after Steve asks some uncomfortable questions about everything written in the Bible. Now facing a crisis of faith, the secret agent takes his family to South Korea to investigate reports of reinvented Noah's Ark

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Rallo tries to break up his elderly friend Murray's new romance, while Donna decides Cleveland needs to lose weight, and signs him up for a gym - but he discovers a less stressful way of getting in shape. With the guest voice of Kathryn Joosten (The West Wing)

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Junior gets a new girlfriend, but Cleveland becomes jealous of their relationship - and suspects the young woman is only trying to seduce his son so she can get permission to stay in the US. Animated comedy, with the guest voice of Rosie Perez (White Men Can't Jump)

programme.title: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Celebrity version of the horror game show, beginning with Towie's Bobby Cole Norris, Pete Wicks and Chloe Sims facing demented bin men, evil toys and an army of clowns

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson narrates more record feats, including the world's longest tongue and the fastest escape from a straitjacket underwater

programme.title: ITV2 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally suspects Kevin might be having an affair. Gary isn't happy about Zoe staying at number nine. Jim advises Steve to look for another girlfriend instead of Fiona

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin asks Natalie to go away with him for the weekend. Sally discovers the truth about Kevin and Natalie and heads to Natalie's to confront them

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris savours the moment Kim and Steve have to move out of Home Farm. Alice goes missing when Kathy leaves her by herself. Will lets down his rugby team by missing the match

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak and Butch apologise to Tara for the poaching incident. Heather suggests organising a quiz night to Alan. Jack lectures Will on his behaviour

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: After Joe's uniform goes missing and the police station is broken into, Geoff admits his Panda car was stolen the day before. George suspects an old adversary of deliberately stirring up trouble. Elsewhere, Rachel reassures a witness in a high profile case he is safe under her care, but a neighbour becomes suspicious of her visits

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: As the Ropers settle into their new home, George realises he is going to have to look for a job. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred becomes broody and starts to dream of motherhood, much to George's dismay - and they consider adoption. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A series of scandals makes for an interesting few days in the quiet village of St Mary Mead, and most seem to revolve around a blustering local colonel, whose brusque manner and short temper make him unpopular with his fellow villagers. When he is found dead with a bullet through the head, Miss Marple and the reluctant DI Slack investigate. Whodunit, starring Geraldine McEwan as Miss Marple, with Jane Asher, Jason Flemying, Derek Jacobi and Miriam Margolyes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When the hunting den belonging to master of the hounds Gordon Radford is vandalised there is no shortage of suspects. Lord Ashfordly is seen publicly arguing with Radford, his kennelman Alec Pickering is threatened with dismissal, and farmer Richard Smith promises repercussions for the damage caused to his land. Ray Ashcroft guest stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is determined that Will should go to Germany. Tara is furious with Biff for ignoring her. Will apologises for all the trouble he's caused

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly is upset about her dad lying about her mum's death. Biff resigns from his chauffeur's job. Terry tries to set up a Woolpack rugby team

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill urges Kevin to do anything he can to get Sally back. Mike tries to teach Curly how to play golf. Sally arrives at Elsie's in Scarborough and tells her she's left Kevin

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: An injured Fred spends the night on the golf course. Sally tries to keep the break-up from the children. Kevin arrives in Scarborough, desperate to talk to Sally

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of an amateur flautist and the disappearance of a maid on a secluded country estate soon have Detective Superintendent Charles Wycliffe unravelling a mystery involving family feuds and illicit relationships. Police drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Following the suicide of Jeanie Long, the woman convicted of the murder of teenager Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier, new evidence comes to light exonerating her. DCI Vera Stanhope reinvestigates the case, but to find out who really killed Abigail, the detective must uncover the secrets of a close-knit community that is still coming to terms with the incident. Detective drama, adapted from Ann Cleeves' novel Telling Tales, guest starring Hugo Speer alongside Brenda Blethyn, David Leon, Wunmi Mosaku and Paul Ritter

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: With the Meredith family reeling from Dylan's death and Sean's arrest, Lisa is charged with finding his alibi and makes a game-changing discovery. Suspicions are raised about another Morecambe resident's involvement with the twins and the police rush to find them. Abbie grows closer to newcomer Vincent, whilst Rob agrees to take on a risky dare. Frustrated by the police investigation, Sean takes matters into his own hands. Starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong, Tracie Bennett and Lindsey Coulson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Captain Ed Perrin has been given permission to sail his vessel all the way into Stockholm through its stunning archipelago. It's a terrifying task for the skipper, for if he gets it wrong he could cause untold damage to a nearby historic windmill or even run aground. Injury strikes the entertainment team, leaving dancer Dulcie paired with a new recruit who doesn't know the routines, and a safety helmet causes problems for excursions agent Timothy and his perfectly styled hair. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

Ray Ashcroft guest stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is delighted when Mike announces his intention to marry into wealth - until a close link between the two families is uncovered

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When Mildred finds out that George only has a small endowment, she decides to do something about it. However, George is none too happy when he realises that he is worth more dead than alive. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George trades his car in for a battered caravan, and Mildred's sister and brother-in-law arrive, leading to problems in the bedroom. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy, Yootha Joyce, Norman Eshley and Sheila Fearn

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates her friend Elspeth McGillicuddy's claim to have witnessed a murder being committed on a passing train during a rail journey, but everyone is stumped by the lack of a body. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, Pam Ferris, Niamh Cusack, John Hannah, Amanda Holden, Griff Rhys Jones, David Warner, Jenny Agutter and Rob Brydon

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Hard-up local employer Albert Ross is suspected of stealing money from a blind man - and as events unfold, it begins to seem increasingly likely he is also putting profits before the welfare of his disgruntled workforce. Meanwhile, David risks his life to save dispirited musician Keith Drake from a watery grave, and inspires him to set about rebuilding his career

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim nags Steve to get a job. Donna resents the attention that Kelly is getting from Vic. Terry refuses to let Will join the Woolpack rugby team

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Betty suspects Mandy of stealing her washing. The Dingles take on the Woolpack pub quiz. Kelly announces that either Viv leaves or she does

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Sally call in the police over Rosie's disappearance. Janice and Les Battersby move into number five with their family. Toyah and Leanne Battersby are caught shoplifting

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Battersbys settle in to their new home and annoy the neighbours with their loud music. Bill and Rita are upset to learn that Sally has left Kevin

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An ancient Cornish folk ritual ends in the murder of a local undertaker - and provides quick-witted copper Charles Wycliffe with one of the most baffling mysteries of his career. Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters, Jimmy Yuill and Susan Penhaligon star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A murder at a remote cottage in Northumberland takes DCI Vera Stanhope back to a place full of childhood memories and reminds her of an unsolved case from earlier in her career. Delving into the local politics surrounding a controversial proposal to dig a quarry, she and her team find motives in the unlikeliest of places - until they realise that the truth could be hidden within the land itself. Detective drama, adapted from Ann Cleeves' novel The Crow Trap, guest starring Daniela Nardini (This Life) alongside Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: Main suspect Nick goes missing, and Lisa is concerned about Sean's possible involvement in the disappearance. The discovery of a key piece of evidence provokes a number of new theories, and the police begin to look more closely at other members of the Meredith family. Elsewhere, Abbie falls deeper into Vincent's world, bringing Sam with her, while Sean's vigilante justice leads him down a dangerous path. Drama, starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong, Tracie Bennett, Lindsey Coulson and Chanel Cresswell

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: It's turnaround day on the Regal Princess, when the crew has to help 3,300 passengers check out with 10,000 pieces of luggage and then welcome the new batch - with just a few hours to clean and prepare 1,800 rooms. As the staff members work against the clock, hotel manager Dirk makes his usual inspections - and will not tolerate any slip in standards. Meanwhile, dancer Dulcie is feeling homesick, and front-desk supervisor Herbert is under pressure to locate some missing luggage and have it delivered at the next port

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid forgets an important party - unfortunately the occasion is his silver wedding anniversary. Sid James stars

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George pushes Mildred to choose between him and the dog when he begins to resent the affection lavished upon her beloved pooch

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: A faulty TV aerial prompts George to borrow his neighbour's ladder - but relations become strained when the henpecked husband falls off the roof and starts pointing the finger of blame. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An unusual message appears in Chipping Cleghorn's local newspaper, revealing details of a forthcoming murder and, while at first glance it looks like a practical joke, the information proves to be deadly accurate. Miss Marple helps Inspector Craddock with his investigation and the pair soon uncover several likely suspects in the village. Feature-length drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Zoe Wanamaker, Elaine Paige, Virginia McKenna, Cherie Lunghi and Frances Barber

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Carol calls the police when she discovers Eva and James Knight's cottage has been vandalised, but the couple are reluctant to involve the law as Eva believes they are being targeted because she is Jewish. Meanwhile, an ancient traction steam engine called Goliath causes chaos in Aidensfield when it breaks down, and further mayhem arises when David takes it for a test run. Deborah Findlay and Tim Woodward guest

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic spends the night worrying about his relationship with Kelly. The Woolpack rugby team play their first match. Lisa finds out that Zak cheated in the quiz

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles clear up after the collapse of their ceiling. Tara is horrified at the state of the Dingles' house. Steve finds his new labouring job tough

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine is impressed when Ashley tells her Fred is leaving him the business. Kevin is devastated when Bill tells him Sally won't have him back

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine feels guilty over kissing Steve. Leanne goes looking for a job at the Salon. Kevin is thrilled when Sally phones to say she's coming home

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy set out to find a motive for a terminally ill property developer's murder. Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a hedgerow but her son survives the attack, only to fall beneath the ice of a frozen pond as he makes his escape. DCI Vera Stanhope wades in and drags him out, and against all the odds he pulls through. As the investigation into the mother's killing unfolds, Vera finds a kindred spirit in the boy and comes to realise the key to solving the case lies deep in his memory. Detective drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, with Kerry Fox and Kieran O'Brien

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: With Nick seriously injured in hospital, Lisa furiously seeks out Sean, while Med feels increasingly side-lined. Sean's revelations lead the team to suspect Nick might have vital information about Holly and Dylan and they desperately wait for him to regain consciousness. Meanwhile, Rob attempts to leave the online forum, but finds that it is not as easy as he had hoped, and Sam tries to offer Abbie a way out from Vincent. Starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong and Matthew McNulty

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When dock worker Owen Thorne plunges from the roof of a multi-storey car park while picking up his daughter from her school prom, Vera immediately detects foul play. The team soon discovers a work dispute over the death of a young man, with everyone believing Owen was to blame, and the victim's father admits he wanted revenge - but his alibi holds. The mystery then continues when Vera spots an inconsistency in the statement Owen's wife gave to the police, suggesting she's not certain of her husband's fidelity

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: The staff compete to win the coveted title of employee of the month, which carries a top prize of $500, as well as deck privileges, tours and extra time off. Deck hand Rhymond is among those with their eye on the top prize, having braved the elements since 5am to keep the ship looking pristine. Meanwhile, Timothy feels sad about leaving his friends on the front desk to start his new job with the shore excursions team, and engineer Scott is left in charge when his boss goes on leave, with jobs including making drinking water from the sea

Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill urges Kevin to do anything he can to get Sally back. Mike tries to teach Curly how to play golf. Sally arrives at Elsie's in Scarborough and tells her she's left Kevin

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: An injured Fred spends the night on the golf course. Sally tries to keep the break-up from the children. Kevin arrives in Scarborough, desperate to talk to Sally

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is determined that Will should go to Germany. Tara is furious with Biff for ignoring her. Will apologises for all the trouble he's caused

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly is upset about her dad lying about her mum's death. Biff resigns from his chauffeur's job. Terry tries to set up a Woolpack rugby team

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When the hunting den belonging to master of the hounds Gordon Radford is vandalised there is no shortage of suspects. Lord Ashfordly is seen publicly arguing with Radford, his kennelman Alec Pickering is threatened with dismissal, and farmer Richard Smith promises repercussions for the damage caused to his land. Ray Ashcroft guest stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is delighted when Mike announces his intention to marry into wealth - until a close link between the two families is uncovered

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When Mildred finds out that George only has a small endowment, she decides to do something about it. However, George is none too happy when he realises that he is worth more dead than alive. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George trades his car in for a battered caravan, and Mildred's sister and brother-in-law arrive, leading to problems in the bedroom. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy, Yootha Joyce, Norman Eshley and Sheila Fearn

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates her friend Elspeth McGillicuddy's claim to have witnessed a murder being committed on a passing train during a rail journey, but everyone is stumped by the lack of a body. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, Pam Ferris, Niamh Cusack, John Hannah, Amanda Holden, Griff Rhys Jones, David Warner, Jenny Agutter and Rob Brydon

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Hard-up local employer Albert Ross is suspected of stealing money from a blind man - and as events unfold, it begins to seem increasingly likely he is also putting profits before the welfare of his disgruntled workforce. Meanwhile, David risks his life to save dispirited musician Keith Drake from a watery grave, and inspires him to set about rebuilding his career

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim nags Steve to get a job. Donna resents the attention that Kelly is getting from Vic. Terry refuses to let Will join the Woolpack rugby team

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Betty suspects Mandy of stealing her washing. The Dingles take on the Woolpack pub quiz. Kelly announces that either Viv leaves or she does

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin and Sally call in the police over Rosie's disappearance. Janice and Les Battersby move into number five with their family. Toyah and Leanne Battersby are caught shoplifting

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Battersbys settle in to their new home and annoy the neighbours with their loud music. Bill and Rita are upset to learn that Sally has left Kevin

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An ancient Cornish folk ritual ends in the murder of a local undertaker - and provides quick-witted copper Charles Wycliffe with one of the most baffling mysteries of his career. Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters, Jimmy Yuill and Susan Penhaligon star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A murder at a remote cottage in Northumberland takes DCI Vera Stanhope back to a place full of childhood memories and reminds her of an unsolved case from earlier in her career. Delving into the local politics surrounding a controversial proposal to dig a quarry, she and her team find motives in the unlikeliest of places - until they realise that the truth could be hidden within the land itself. Detective drama, adapted from Ann Cleeves' novel The Crow Trap, guest starring Daniela Nardini (This Life) alongside Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: Main suspect Nick goes missing, and Lisa is concerned about Sean's possible involvement in the disappearance. The discovery of a key piece of evidence provokes a number of new theories, and the police begin to look more closely at other members of the Meredith family. Elsewhere, Abbie falls deeper into Vincent's world, bringing Sam with her, while Sean's vigilante justice leads him down a dangerous path. Drama, starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong, Tracie Bennett, Lindsey Coulson and Chanel Cresswell

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: It's turnaround day on the Regal Princess, when the crew has to help 3,300 passengers check out with 10,000 pieces of luggage and then welcome the new batch - with just a few hours to clean and prepare 1,800 rooms. As the staff members work against the clock, hotel manager Dirk makes his usual inspections - and will not tolerate any slip in standards. Meanwhile, dancer Dulcie is feeling homesick, and front-desk supervisor Herbert is under pressure to locate some missing luggage and have it delivered at the next port

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George pushes Mildred to choose between him and the dog when he begins to resent the affection lavished upon her beloved pooch

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: A faulty TV aerial prompts George to borrow his neighbour's ladder - but relations become strained when the henpecked husband falls off the roof and starts pointing the finger of blame. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An unusual message appears in Chipping Cleghorn's local newspaper, revealing details of a forthcoming murder and, while at first glance it looks like a practical joke, the information proves to be deadly accurate. Miss Marple helps Inspector Craddock with his investigation and the pair soon uncover several likely suspects in the village. Feature-length drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Zoe Wanamaker, Elaine Paige, Virginia McKenna, Cherie Lunghi and Frances Barber

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Carol calls the police when she discovers Eva and James Knight's cottage has been vandalised, but the couple are reluctant to involve the law as Eva believes they are being targeted because she is Jewish. Meanwhile, an ancient traction steam engine called Goliath causes chaos in Aidensfield when it breaks down, and further mayhem arises when David takes it for a test run. Deborah Findlay and Tim Woodward guest

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic spends the night worrying about his relationship with Kelly. The Woolpack rugby team play their first match. Lisa finds out that Zak cheated in the quiz

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles clear up after the collapse of their ceiling. Tara is horrified at the state of the Dingles' house. Steve finds his new labouring job tough

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine is impressed when Ashley tells her Fred is leaving him the business. Kevin is devastated when Bill tells him Sally won't have him back

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine feels guilty over kissing Steve. Leanne goes looking for a job at the Salon. Kevin is thrilled when Sally phones to say she's coming home

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy set out to find a motive for a terminally ill property developer's murder. Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a hedgerow but her son survives the attack, only to fall beneath the ice of a frozen pond as he makes his escape. DCI Vera Stanhope wades in and drags him out, and against all the odds he pulls through. As the investigation into the mother's killing unfolds, Vera finds a kindred spirit in the boy and comes to realise the key to solving the case lies deep in his memory. Detective drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, with Kerry Fox and Kieran O'Brien

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: With Nick seriously injured in hospital, Lisa furiously seeks out Sean, while Med feels increasingly side-lined. Sean's revelations lead the team to suspect Nick might have vital information about Holly and Dylan and they desperately wait for him to regain consciousness. Meanwhile, Rob attempts to leave the online forum, but finds that it is not as easy as he had hoped, and Sam tries to offer Abbie a way out from Vincent. Starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong and Matthew McNulty

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When dock worker Owen Thorne plunges from the roof of a multi-storey car park while picking up his daughter from her school prom, Vera immediately detects foul play. The team soon discovers a work dispute over the death of a young man, with everyone believing Owen was to blame, and the victim's father admits he wanted revenge - but his alibi holds. The mystery then continues when Vera spots an inconsistency in the statement Owen's wife gave to the police, suggesting she's not certain of her husband's fidelity

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: The staff compete to win the coveted title of employee of the month, which carries a top prize of $500, as well as deck privileges, tours and extra time off. Deck hand Rhymond is among those with their eye on the top prize, having braved the elements since 5am to keep the ship looking pristine. Meanwhile, Timothy feels sad about leaving his friends on the front desk to start his new job with the shore excursions team, and engineer Scott is left in charge when his boss goes on leave, with jobs including making drinking water from the sea

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Drug dealers kidnap a woman's child in a bid to deter her from testifying against them at a forthcoming - forcing Dempsey to turn to shady character the Bogeyman for help

programme.desc: Members of Regan's own flying squad fall under suspicion when £35,000 in cash goes missing during an operation to protect a security van. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The duo investigate the strange deaths of several astronomers whose bodies have been mysteriously bleached white, and encounter an eccentric society dedicated to establishing contact with aliens from Venus. Jon Pertwee guest stars in the series' first colour episode

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is repaid a debt in dodgy £20 notes, but by the time it comes to light they are counterfeit his creditor is heading on a flight to India. Once the Winchester is pinpointed as the source of the forged currency, Arthur also finds he has Chisholm breathing down his neck. Robbie Coltrane and Art Malik guest star, with George Cole and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle spring into action when East German agents blackmail a government employee into revealing secret plans for a new type of jet-engine tank. Featuring an appearance by playwright Lynda La Plante, alongside stars Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The Baker Street sleuth is summoned to the Lake District to investigate the mysterious disappearance of an enigmatic woman. Period detective drama, guest starring Michael Jayston and Cheryl Campbell with Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: A girl is followed home from a launderette and abducted. The man responsible seems to want Makepeace find him, which concerns Dempsey.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan uses a criminal's abandoned dog as bait to lure his remorseful owner back into the country from France. However, associates of the villain spirit the hound away from its pound and a race begins as to who can locate the dog first. Alfred Marks, Brian Glover and Brian Wilde guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel investigate a spate of murders, and discover a ruthless businessman has been killing his rivals to gain a competitive edge. Vintage adventures, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Apparently successful entrepreneur Clive Cosgrove loses his 'confidence' after Arthur and Terry attend his wedding celebrations. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Mower, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a CIA agent dies after being thrown off a balcony, the unit sets up a fake arms deal with the German terrorist cell responsible. However, the gunrunners uncover the ploy, kidnap Bodie and transform him into a walking time-bomb. Lewis Collins stars

programme.desc: TV presenter Fern Britton, former England cricketer Matthew Hoggard, lingerie tycoon Michelle Mone and actor Neil Morrissey pit their general knowledge against a trivia expert as they try to win thousands of pounds for charity. Spy thriller, starring Sean Connery, Robert Shaw, Daniela Bianchi and Lotte Lenya

programme.desc: A racehorse trainer asks Holmes to investigate the mysterious disappearance of one of his cash-strapped employer's many creditors. Victorian whodunit, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke, with a young Jude Law in an early supporting role

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo find themselves the target of a powerful diamond merchant, forcing Dempsey to enlist the aid of a former boxer he put behind bars

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Recently released criminal Eddie Boyse becomes prime suspect in an assault case - and Regan believes he is guilty. Unfortunately for the officer, Boyse has the perfect alibi - he was in Regan's company when the crime was committed. Drama, starring John Thaw, with Dennis Waterman and Del Henney

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When the Ministry is broken into by an apparently invisible man, it seems a secret formula has fallen into the hands of an organisation run by Soviet Intelligence. Light-hearted action, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Meera Syal (The Kumars), fashion designer David Emanuel, former England rugby player Kyran Bracken and comedian Johnny Vegas compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: The documentary going behind the scenes of the London airport returns for a fifth season. Inside the terminal, seasoned pro Demi dishes out deals for delayed passengers, while outside on the airfield, Ian is on the runway as it goes into lockdown with a full armed police presence. For the first time this series, viewers will also see the work of the Border Force's canine drugs detection team - Rachel and her dog Cole, who in his career has intercepted more than £1million worth of class-A contraband. Narrated by Julie Walters

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport

Having been reluctant to buy it just two and a half years ago, Nitasha has made the place home and believes it has the potential to be perfect for their future family. However, Nikunj feels like the work on the house will never be done, and would prefer to look for somewhere new

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows more of Britain's most ambitious self-building projects, as intrepid individuals attempt to design and construct the home of their dreams. In this first edition, Kevin meets former army captain Justin, who has spent £1.8million on an abandoned neo-Gothic cemetery keeper's lodge and adjoining ex-council toilet block in south-west London. Justin's vision is to restore the lodge but demolish the ugly toilet blocks and replace them with an enormous luxury ground-floor extension, with an added moat and a giant basement with a swimming pool - all just metres from the nearest grave

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back

programme.title: Tom Allen Goes to Town
programme.desc: The comedian visits the West Yorkshire town of Wakefield, taking in one of the world's biggest rhubarb crops, exploring its beautiful cathedral and visiting one of the only drive-in fish and chip shops in the world. He also buys a round of Wakefield's famous steak pies and helps renovate the nearby Caribbean restaurant for the family he's been staying with. At the Theatre Royal, Tom is joined by a special assistant for a comedy show - none other than Spandau Ballet's Martin Kemp - entertaining host a full house of locals

programme.title: The Man Who Fell from the Sky
programme.desc: In 2015, two men stowed away in the landing gear of a British Airways flight from Johannesburg to Heathrow. One of them fell to his death in Richmond - making worldwide headlines - but miraculously his companion survived an 11-hour journey with temperatures reaching -60 C. In this documentary, Richard Bentley sets out to uncover who they were, how they got on the plane, and why they decided to undertake such a dangerous and desperate mission

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Following the lives of orphas in the Nyaru Menteng Orangutan Rescue Centre in Borneo, the largest rehabilitation centre of its type in the world. The programme follows the work of a team of devoted staff as they help orangutans that have been displaced from their habitat or kept as illegal pets learn the skills necessary to survive on their own once they are returned to the wild. In the first episode, the programme introduces some of the big characters in the centre, including 'class clown' Valentino, and 'Big Boy' Beni

Assistant Alex Horne helps coax the contestants, but it's Taskmaster Greg Davies who determines the victor

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels through Turkey, reflecting on the achievements of Mustafa Kemal Ataturk - the founder of the republic who oversaw the modernisation of the country and its railways. He begins his journey at Istanbul railway station, the starting point of the Marmaray rail tunnel, which passes beneath the Bosphorus and was built to withstand earthquakes. He also visits Ankara and the volcanic spires of Cappadocia, before heading deep into the mountains and ending in the remote borderlands city of Kars

programme.title: London's Greatest Bridges with Rob Bell
programme.desc: Rob Bell explores the extraordinary stories of four of London's most iconic bridges, uncovering the history behind how - and why - they were built. In the first episode, Rob focuses on the original, and for 17 centuries the only bridge across the Thames, London Bridge. Rob explores the multiple versions of this bridge over the centuries and charts how each has shaped Britain's capital city, from the Romans who used it to control southern England, to the astonishing and raucous medieval bridge, designed by priests, inhabited by hundreds, and financed and managed by City merchants

programme.title: The Thames: Britain's Great River with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter discovers what makes the Thames one of the greatest rivers in the world. This time, Tony gains access to one of the most iconic landmarks to sit on - or over - the River Thames, the Battersea Power Station. He goes inside the famous Control Room A to see how it is being restored and even has a go at replacing one of the laylights in the ceiling. Upstream in Berkshire, he visits the Cliveden House, before learning more about a unique art installation project on the river

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: In His Own Words
programme.desc: An affectionate look back at the comedian's life and career thus far in a documentary charting his early struggles to launch his showbusiness career through to hosting the Royal Variety Performance and his arena-filling tours. programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Showtime

programme.title: Secrets of Your Supermarket Food
programme.desc: Sian Williams and Stefan Gates present the documentary lifting the lid on the growth, production and sale of supermarket food. They focus on dairy products, visiting a dairy farm to find out how they supply the huge demand for milk - and also finding out why plant-based milk alternatives can cost four times as much. Plus, a report on the sugar content of some of the most popular yoghurts on the market

programme.title: Natural History Museum: World of Wonder
programme.desc: Documentary venturing behind the doors of one of the greatest museums in the world. Every year, five million people visit London's Natural History Museum to see its incredible collection, from extraordinary dinosaurs to giant whales, and rare fossils to space rocks said to be as old as the solar system itself. But only a fraction of the staggering 80 million items in the collection are on display. Here cameras capture some of these incredible specimens, revealing the unique and rare pieces too valuable to exhibit

programme.title: Egypt's Great Mummies: Unwrapped with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: Professor Bettany Hughes takes viewers on a journey of discovery as she investigates 10 of the greatest and most intriguing Egyptian mummies - and the secrets that lie beneath the bandages. Having remained in their tombs for thousands of years, wrapped, embalmed and buried with treasure, each mummy tells the story of the criminals, priests, children and pharaohs of Ancient Egypt

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The case of Malaysia Airlines Flight 370, which disappeared without a trace in March 2014, and why technology has so far been unable to find its wreckage

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: The return of the documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. A patient in police custody is brought in for treatment to a split eyebrow and some facial wounds, while the resus team attempts to save the life of a patient who is rushed into hospital in cardiac arrest

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed £7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property

programme.title: The Funny Thing About
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas is joined by celebrities and comedians for a talking heads show combining observational comedy, confessions and anecdotes. In the first edition, the host offers an insightful look at children, including how to make them, how to look after them, and how to not look after them

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice offers advice to a bachelor having trouble selling his home in Knutsford, Cheshire, telling him to tone down its resolutely masculine decor and add a few softer touches

programme.title: How Green Was My Valley (1941)
programme.desc: Residents of a Welsh mining community at the start of the 20th century struggle to come to terms with the decline in their traditional way of life. Oscar-winning drama, starring Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara, Donald Crisp and Roddy McDowall

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Man from Colorado (1948)
programme.desc: An American Civil War veteran, twisted by his experiences during the conflict, becomes the judge of a small town. He embarks on a reign of terror, ruthlessly misusing his power, and it falls to an old friend from his army days to bring him down. Western, starring Glenn Ford, William Holden, Ellen Drew and Ray Collins

programme.title: Captain Scarlett (1953)
programme.desc: A brave nobleman forms a band of outlaws to free 19th-century French villagers from the tyranny of an evil duke, reclaim his birthright and save a lovely princess from a fate worse than death at the hands of a lecherous count. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Richard Greene, Leonora Amar, Nedrick Young and Manolo Fabregas

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: Logan (2017)
programme.desc: In the near future, Wolverine cares for an ailing Professor X somewhere on the Mexican border. However, the razor-clawed hero's attempts to hide from the world are turned upside down when a young mutant arrives, pursued by cyborg bounty hunters in the employ of a sinister corporation. Fantasy adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Dafne Keen and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Criminal (2016)
programme.desc: A deceased CIA agent's secrets, skills and memories are implanted into a death-row inmate in the hope that he will complete an operative's crucial mission. Thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Ryan Reynolds, Gary Oldman and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice and Zombies (2016)
programme.desc: Regency England is overrun by hordes of zombies following an outbreak of the Black Death. Five sisters put their talent for martial arts to good use fighting the ravenous hordes of the walking dead, while also contending with the equally daunting challenge of finding suitable husbands. Comedy adventure based on Seth Grahame-Smith's novel, starring Lily James, Sam Riley, Matt Smith and Charles Dance

programme.title: Timberjack (1954)
programme.desc: A man forced to return to his Montana home to take over the family lumber business sets out to discover the reasons behind his father's death, while engaging in a fierce professional and romantic rivalry with a neighbouring forester. Western drama, starring Sterling Hayden, David Brian, Vera Ralston and Hoagy Carmichael

programme.title: The Malta Story (1953)
programme.desc: The island of Malta comes under siege during the Second World War, as both Allied and Axis forces see it as vital to their supply lines. A British reconnaissance pilot arrives on the island, and plays a crucial role in defending it from the advancing enemy forces. Drama, starring Alec Guinness, Anthony Steel, Jack Hawkins, Muriel Pavlow and Flora Robson

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: The Wrecking Crew (1968)
programme.desc: A secret agent sets out to recover gold bullion stolen from a hijacked train being taken across America by cunning thieves. Fourth and final film in the Matt Helm comedy spy series, with Dean Martin, Sharon Tate, Elke Sommer, Nancy Kwan and Tina Louise

programme.title: The Italian Job (1969)
programme.desc: A crook assembles a motley gang to steal £4million in gold bullion from an Italian armoured car, which brings Turin to a standstill and enables the robbers to make a quick getaway in a fleet of Minis - but they end up falling foul of the Mafia along the way. Crime comedy, starring Michael Caine, Noel Coward, Benny Hill, Tony Beckley and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to be his bodyguard as he has had death threats made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh, with Daisy Ridley, Derek Jacobi and Johnny Depp

programme.title: Trespass Against Us (2016)
programme.desc: An Irish Traveller tries to give his children what he never had - a solid start in life with a decent education. Crime drama, starring Michael Fassbender and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: Dark Places (2015)
programme.desc: A seven-year-old girl witnesses the murder of her mother and sisters, and testifies that her teenage brother was the killer, leading to his imprisonment. As an adult, she attends a gathering of true-crime fans, and discovers they all think her brother was innocent. She reluctantly agrees to revisit the crime, and begins to realise her memories may not be as reliable as she thought. Mystery, starring Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult, Christina Hendricks and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian (1949)
programme.desc: French settlers are granted asylum in America in the aftermath of Napoleon's defeat at Waterloo and a Kentucky rifleman finds himself falling for one of the newcomers - a general's daughter. However, he faces a rival for her affections in the form of a ruthless landowner who plans to steal the terrritory her fellow exiles have settled on. George Waggner's Western, starring John Wayne, Vera Hruba Ralston, Philip Dorn and Oliver Hardy

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom (1957)
programme.desc: A man who has only six months to live returns to the land his family owns in the Canadian Rockies. He intends to prove his grandfather's frequently derided theory that there is oil to be found there, but he has little time to find it, as the area will be flooded when construction is completed on a nearby dam. Adventure, with Dirk Bogarde, Stanley Baker, Michael Craig and Barbara Murray

programme.title: Cowboy (1958)
programme.desc: A Chicago hotel clerk befriends a visiting cowboy and soon talks his way into joining him on a cattle drive so he can impress the woman he loves. The tenderfoot has no idea of what awaits him as he ventures out into the Wild West, an experience that forces him to undergo a dramatic change. Western, starring Jack Lemmon, Glenn Ford, Anna Kashfi and Brian Donlevy

programme.title: Carry On Nurse (1959)
programme.desc: The patients on the men's ward of Haven Hospital cause more mayhem for the staff than the rest of the hospital combined, forcing the management to send in a formidable matron to control the situation. Feeling aggrieved by her no-nonsense methods, the chaps decide the time is right to get their own back. Comedy, with Kenneth Williams, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey, Shirley Eaton and Leslie Phillips

programme.title: WarGames (1983)
programme.desc: A teenager hacks into a top-secret military supercomputer, which challenges him to what he thinks is a game. However, the machine has complete control of the US nuclear arsenal, and the youngster's actions are unwittingly pushing the world to the brink of war. Thriller, starring Matthew Broderick, Ally Sheedy, Dabney Coleman and John Wood

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017)
programme.desc: Having saved the world once, secret agents Eggsy and Merlin join forces with their US counterparts to bring down a psychotic femme fatale. Thankfully they are assisted by a veteran hero brought back from the dead, and cross paths with a kidnapped Elton John and a couple of killer robot dogs along the way. Director Matthew Vaughn's comedy adventure sequel, starring Taron Egerton, Colin Firth, Mark Strong and Julianne Moore

programme.title: The Heat (2013)
programme.desc: An uptight, ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to bring a notorious drug kingpin to justice. She ends up forced to team up with a rebellious, foul-mouthed local police detective who has a very different attitude to law enforcement but shares her inability to work with others. Action comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: The Keeping Room (2014)
programme.desc: Three women living on an isolated farm during the American Civil War must defend their home from renegade Union soldiers using a mission to track down deserters as cover for murder, rape and robbery. Western, starring Brit Marling, Hailee Steinfeld, Muna Otaru and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: John Paul is fearful when he speaks to George about the dangerous situation unfolding in the village. Elsewhere, Ollie's actions threaten to tear Cindy and Luke apart

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is more convinced than ever that Silas is the McQueens' tormentor. Meanwhile, Darren, Nancy and Mandy struggle to come to terms with the events of New Year's Eve

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted realises he could take any one of three women to the wedding, but chooses poorly over which to spend time with. Barney and Robin steal Marshall and Lily's story on how they first met after feeling judged about their messy past by the stern minister who is marrying them. Meanwhile, Marshall finds out more about his driving companion Daphne on their long journey. American sitcom, starring Josh Radon and Alyson Hannifin

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Daphne reveals the truth about Marshall becoming a judge in a text message to Lily, so he begs Ted to try to delete the notification while Lily is sleeping using the gang's 'no questions asked' rule. However, Barney and Robin also attempt to help Ted, but realise they are both acting on their own initiative without consulting each other. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Ben Corry is away for months at a time with the army, leaving stay-at-home mum Maria to discipline their four rowdy daughters. Jo Frost brings this military family into line

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A fresh group of people embarks on the social experiment, beginning by celebrating their final night of single life in style with the ultimate stag and hen parties

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt begins to worry he is being set up for a fall by one of his superiors, and Peralta is handed the chance to work on an important case. Meanwhile, Jeffords tries to make sure his twins get a place at their chosen school. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Terry Crews

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he is made responsible for distributing extra grant money. Bernadette turns the back garden playhouse into a hideaway to escape from her husband and children

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to befriend Amy's father, but when Howard lures Mr Fowler away with his magic tricks Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs Fowler. Meanwhile, Raj and Anu attempt to get physical. Kathy Bates and Teller guest star

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD feels the same things keep happening in the hospital, and Dr Cox returns to work, but Elliot fears he is not his usual confident self. Meanwhile, Carla grows resentful that Turk can still do things she cannot because of her pregnancy

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD challenges a urologist's assessment, but later becomes attracted to her. Elliot considers breaking up with Keith, and the Janitor has an argument with Dr Kelso about fear. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, with Elizabeth Banks (Zack and Miri)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel tries to gain votes by co-hosting a local TV show with Joe, and their on-camera bickering makes them an instant hit. But their popularity begins to have an effect on Lennox and Ryder, so they must decide on whether fame or family is more important. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's new boyfriend Noah temporarily moves in to her apartment while his is being renovated, and Lennox starts a dream internship at a local newspaper - but struggles to wake up in time for work

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins. but Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher over plans for a Halloween fundraiser for the church. Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl that Sheldon is tutoring

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are thrilled when their super-asymmetry theory is proved correct by two physicists from Chicago - until the experts try to exclude Amy from their Nobel Prize nomination. Bernadette experiences a big success at work and plans for Penny to become a part of it - whether she wants to or not

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is excited to help Howard and Bernadette navigate some bureaucratic paperwork, until he discovers that they are breaking the law, leaving him with a difficult choice between following the rules or staying loyal to his friends. Leonard is disappointed when he is excluded from a scientific project his friends are working on

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Silas has one more game left to play with the McQueens, leaving Mercedes panicked when Sylver returns from the airport without Bobby

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A bride's wedding turns to disaster when she oversleeps on her big day, and a big-hearted guy meets the girl of his dreams, only to have his perfect day ruined by his best man

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Comedy set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland. The start of a new school term gets off to a bad start for Erin when she wakes to find her cousin reading her diary. But there is worse to come when Granda Joe announces a bomb has been found on the bridge. Saoirse-Monica Jackson stars

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. So when an opportunity to get out of the test presents itself, they jump at the chance - especially as it involves spending time with Father Peter, who everyone fancies. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette have a dispute over whether female scientists should flaunt their sexuality to try to get ahead at work. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang re-creates a prom night on the roof of the apartment building when the girls decide they would like to re-enact their evenings with their current partners. However, Sheldon feels under pressure to take part in all the romantic traditions, and Howard worries about who Stuart will bring as his date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

Basement Jaxx singer Sharlene is used to taking centre stage with her hit band, but she hasn't found a man to share the spotlight with her, while 27-year-old Derby lass Rachel is a single mum of two with little time for herself

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: With Angel's soul removed and safely stored away, the gang is able to interrogate the resurrected Angelus for information about the Beast, but his mind games turn them against each other. Directed by Sean Astin, most famous for his role as Samwise Gamgee in the Lord of the Rings movies

Meanwhile, Ted and Cassie try to enjoy a trip to a lighthouse, and Marshall and Daphne must deal with a stowaway on their road trip. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin is upset to discover her mother cannot attend the wedding. Guest starring Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps a family with six fiercely independent children to bring some order to their lives, in particular, helping the older kids to deal with the death of their father

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A bride's wedding turns to disaster when she oversleeps on her big day, and a big-hearted guy meets the girl of his dreams, only to have his perfect day ruined by his best man

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are devastated after learning from a Russian paper that Super Asymmetry has already been discovered and disproved. Bernadette wants to beat Howard in a video game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD snaps at Elliot when she inadvertently keeps interrupting his date plans with Dr Briggs. Meanwhile, a baby shower is thrown for Carla, and Jordan discovers she is pregnant. Comedy, with Zach Braff and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD reels from the news he will soon be a father and Dr Cox realises he needs to control his anger now that he and Jordan are expecting another child. Turk and Carla also prepare for the arrival of their baby, leaving Elliot upset she is not part of the family trend. Comedy, guest starring Elizabeth Banks, with an appearance by the Blue Man Group

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe and Ryder sell some of Mel's old belongings, they accidentally dispose of a very personal item that she wants to get back. Desperate to reclaim it, Mel and Joe turn to crime to achieve their aims. Elsewhere, Lennox discovers that her new pen pal wants to meet her in person. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, it soon takes over their lives. Meanwhile, George Sr becomes jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel from the car workshop. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

With guest appearance by William Shatner, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Kevin Smith

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Silas forces Mercedes to make a decision. Meanwhile, Joel is in crisis and Walter offers him some advice, and Toby offers to help look for Bobby

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: From entertainment juggernauts to the week's biggest news stories and from hard-hitting documentary series to gritty drama, a cast of well-known faces offers sharp, insightful, funny and sometimes emotional critiques of popular and topical TV shows, sparking debate and giving viewers the chance to share those 'we said that' moments. This episode features Denise Van Outen and her partner Eddie, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Joe Swash and Stacey Solomon, Zoe Ball and her son Woody Cook, Nicola Adams and her partner Ella, Harry Redknapp and his wife Sandra, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Emilia Fox and Joanna David, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Jamie Theakston and Ashley Roberts, Nigel Havers and Denis Lawson, Johnny Vegas and his PA Bev, and Jools Holland and Vic Reeves

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including (Un)well, When Harry Met Sally, Countdown, Britain's Got Talent, Mary Berry's Simple Comforts, Elephant Hospital, BBC news reports on quarantine, and young people and Covid, and ITV news coverage of Brexit

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon bids an emotional goodbye to Fun with Flags as he and Amy record the final instalment of the internet show. Leonard, Howard and Raj clear out the office of a recently deceased professor and take a peek at his research. Guest starring LeVar Burton

programme.title: Gogglebox
