programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A popular girl at an exclusive school is murdered and an examination of her clothes reveals evidence of a substance that Adam believes could only have come from Mars. The detectives discover a male pupil is in possession of a lizard that may be responsible for the strange traces and an exploration of his link to the victim uncovers incidences of jealousy and bullying

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a rare coin dealer, focusing their efforts on a millionaire who seems the most likely culprit - but Ross finds himself forced to play detective too. Sam Waterson and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs entrusts the team with the task of finding his former commanding officer, who has gone on the run rather than staying behind to face charges of killing a marine and stealing funds. Kate and Tony's investigation leads them to the missing man's cabin - which has been sprayed with bullets and contains an unidentified corpse. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky, Gerald and Kate are taken hostage by a gunman who demands evidence relating to the recent shooting of a suspected terrorist. As Gibbs and the team struggle to resolve the crisis, they are alarmed to discover there is a Hamas operative in their midst. Crime drama, guest starring Alan Dale (Ugly Betty)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Gibbs recovers from his gunshot wound, the team is called in to investigate the killing of a US Marine and tries to determine whether the crime is related to an alleged case of blackmail at an illegal nightclub. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the team investigate the death of a prostitute at a pop-up brothel. The detectives contemplate if there was foul play was at work or whether this could be a case of a junkie who relapsed, turned to tricking, got depressed and committed suicide. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Tutuola investigate when a prisoner dies in custody, and learn that he was assaulted before being incarcerated. This leads them to two police officers who are discovered to have been killing drug dealers - one for revenge, the other for money. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a baby girl with a genetic disorder is found inside a fridge. The trail of evidence points to her mother - leaving Alex facing a difficult decision as her feelings get in the way of the prosecution. Drama, guest starring Judd Hirsch with Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Stephanie March

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman asks Benson and Stabler to help her find out who made her daughter pregnant. The girl, who has Down's syndrome, is unable to give much information, especially while being pressured by her distraught mother to abort the baby

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is accused of abusing her teenage stepson - who is later implicated in a murder. As investigations proceed, she goes to great lengths to protect him and prevent the detectives learning the truth. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The murder of a transvestite in a church throws suspicion on its resident priest, who Benson and Stabler discover has a history of sexual abuse charges. They try to talk to the cleric's previous victims, who are reluctant to get involved because of a confidentiality agreement they signed - but when one of them finally opens up, new light is thrown on the culprit's identity

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mac continues the investigation into the killing of Carver's sister and discovers a bullet lodged in the corpse's chest that matches a gun registered to the chief. However, Jo warns him of the consequences of accusing a senior officer of murder. Starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 gardening staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens. Palm House keeper Emma Fox is seen doing battle with a plague of thrips, while tree gang member Jon Hammerton fells a diseased tree

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: First episode of the drama about a military bomb disposal team working in London during the blitz. New recruit Brian Ash is thrown in at the deep end. Starring Anthony Andrews

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: This Is London
programme.desc: Take a tour of London through some of the city's most exciting, trendiest businesses and products, featuring ads from Elan Cafe, Cityspace, The Oblique Life and more

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Diana tries to teach her grandchildren a lesson in money management, but Jimmy ruins the attempt by slipping the kids a few quid on the sly. She argues the case for deferred gratification as a character builder, so he retaliates by going out and buying her the laptop she has been after

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A distressed teenager explores cures for hair-loss, and a professional singer tries to save her career by learning to control her severe acid reflux. A mother fears her six-year-old son will be a target for bullying because of his psoriasis, and doctors help an obese father reverse damage done to his liver

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: First episode of the 1970s British sci-fi series. Two interdimensional operatives with special abilities investigate strange events to protect the universe

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef celebrates the influence of Eastern cuisine in the capital by preparing sticky chicken with Malaysian salad, and soft-steamed buns

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Guns in the Afternoon
programme.desc: Through the eyes of his grieving mother, family and friends, this film tells the story of Kieron Bernard; rapper, gang leader and street hustler who died in a shootout in 2002

programme.title: Away (2016)
programme.desc: In Blackpool, an unlikely friendship blossoms between a lonely, suicidal widower and a young woman trying to escape an abusive ex-boyfriend. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Juno Temple and Matt Ryan

programme.title: Closing the Ring (2007)
programme.desc: An old woman consumed by grief following the death of her husband receives a message from a stranger who claims to have found a ring belonging to her that was lost decades before. The discovery brings to light secrets from her past and causes her to look back to the beginnings of her marriage. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer and Neve Campbell

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love (2015)
programme.desc: A married woman has an affair with a co-worker, only for him to be sucked into a mysterious hole that suddenly appears in her home. She has to find a way to get him out of this strange imprisonment without anyone learning about their secret relationship. Sci-fi romantic comedy, starring Alison Brie and Justin Chatwin

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew mistake an Irishman for a leprechaun, and help him to find his lost friend - who turns out to be a bear

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The King of Sweden accuses Halvar of stealing his jeweled sceptre. Vic must find a way to prove his father's innocence without making the king look stupid

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara loses her favourite doll at the beach so Zigby turns detective to find it

programme.desc: Ash employs some new technology that does not work. A new recruit gets some training, and a magazine article causes tension amid the team's superior officers

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: Far from the Madding Crowd (1967)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arouses the ardour of three rival suitors in 19th-century rural Dorset and, having flirted and toyed with their affections, she chooses to marry a caddish, gambling soldier - a decision that leads to a sequence of harrowing events. John Schlesinger's adaptation of Thomas Hardy's classic novel, with Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Terence Stamp and Peter Finch

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Record producer Sam Phillips recalls how he discovered Elvis Presley. Landmark series from the 1970s, recounting the birth of rock 'n' roll

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing

programme.title: The Crouches
programme.desc: Natalie begins to feel bored in her marriage, a situation not helped by the arrival of a dishy new reverend who offers her a little more than spiritual guidance. Can Roly possibly compete with a man who has God on his side? Robbie Gee and Jo Martin star in the comedy, with Rudolph Walker, Danny John-Jules and Don Warrington

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Series of one-off comedy dramas

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Gloves Off (2017)
programme.desc: A fighter attempts to save his beloved gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight. Comedy drama, starring Brad Moore, Greg Orvis and Ricky Tomlinson

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Three Steps in the Dark (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy eccentric invites all the members of his family to his country house, so he can discuss the contents of his Will. However, when he is suddenly killed, everyone present is a suspect. Murder mystery, starring Greta Gynt and Hugh Sinclair

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: Swan Corner
programme.desc: A day in the life on the High Street in West Wickham, shot in 1968 on 8mm film. Showing activities at different times of the day, including The Swan Pub

programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Poplar for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 36-year-old man with gout visits the hospital, and despite the ailment's age-old associations with elderly men and rich living, he discovers his is hereditary. The doctors hear from a woman seeking a dietary cure for depression, and a mother-of-three who has lived on pancakes and chocolate for two years. Dr Pixie McKenna is also on hand to reveal the truth about detox diets

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the work of 'bionic' vet Noel Fitzpatrick, who uses pioneering surgical techniques at his state-of-the-art centre in Surrey to save the lives of critically ill pets from around the country. In the first episode he tries to replace a cat's two paws after they were severed by a combine harvester, and tackles a Labrador's crippling arthritis

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A journey along the Thames from the Cotswold Hills to the North Sea, concentrating on the lives of the water voles, swans and eels that call it home, and highlighting the escalating battle to control the waterways despite technological advances in flood management. As London continues to sink faster than Venice, the untamed nature of the river is revealed

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: When Roy befriends an old flame from Sally's past, it looks like Tom is set to lose any hope of getting together with his neighbour, as well as his best friend. To make matters worse, Amber demands to know why her father has never told her that he loves her. Comedy, guest starring Clive Russell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: A drunk John Hurt arrives in the neighbourhood, while Joe takes advantage of Michael's absence by taking over his house. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Guvnors (2014)
programme.desc: A conflict erupts between two generations of criminals in a rough London neighbourhood. When the sadistic young leader of a gang brutally attacks a former football hooligan, it inspires one of his old friends to get his firm back together and get revenge. Crime thriller, starring Doug Allen, Harley Sylvester and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part one of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.desc: South Africa v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the third day of the Second Test in the two-match series, taking place at Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: South Africa v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the third day of the Second Test in the two-match series, taking place at Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg. The last series in South Africa between the two sides saw Sri Lanka win the two-match series 2-0. The series saw a famous run chase from Sri Lanka in the First Test, where Kusal Perara and Visha Fernando shared 78 runs in the highest tenth-wicket partnership in a successful run chase in tests.

programme.desc: South Africa v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the Second Test in the two-match series, taking place at Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg, as both teams battle it out for important points in the World Test Championship. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Dallas Cowboys' 1993 Super Bowl triumph against Buffalo Bills at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. This match represented the first time in history that the same teams faced each other in the showpiece match in two consecutive years, while the Cowboys' 30-13 victory meant they tied the Pittsburgh Steelers and the San Francisco 49ers for most Super Bowl wins, as they claimed their fourth trophy

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Baltimore Ravens' 2000 Super Bowl success over New York Giants at the Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida. The Ravens became the second team in four years to win the Super Bowl after qualifying for the play-offs as one of the wildcard teams, and the 34-7 victory was the first for the franchise since leaving Cleveland under a huge cloud of controversy
